transcript:
CALLER: Hello. I want to know — do you offer any senior citizen discounts on consultations?
AGENT: Yes! We have a 15% concession on consultation fees for senior citizens above the age of 65.
CALLER: That's kind. And for diagnostics and lab tests?
AGENT: For lab tests there's a 10% senior citizen discount on our standard price list. Some packages already have discounted rates inclusive.
CALLER: What ID proof is needed to avail this?
AGENT: Any government-issued ID showing your date of birth — Aadhaar, PAN, voter ID, or senior citizen card — is acceptable at the billing counter.
CALLER: Very considerate. Thank you.
